word: H62 - אָבֵל בֵּית־מֲעַכָה - ʼÂbêl Bêyth-Măʻakâh - aw-bale' bayth ma-akaw' - Abel-beth-maachah

sections.paragraph:
Original: אבל בּית־מעכה

Transliteration: 'âbêl bêyth mă‛akâh

Phonetic: aw-bale' bayth ma-a-kaw'

BDB Definition:

Abel Beth Maachah = "meadow of the house of Maachah"
  1. city in northern Israel near Beth Maachah

Origin: from H58 and H1004 and H4601

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
Cognate: H58, H59, H63, H64, H65, H66, H67
